headline: Reese's Founder's Grandson Says 'It Was Not Edible' And Throws Out New Candy — Blames Swapping Real Milk Chocolate For 'Compound Coating'
summary: Some family legacies come wrapped in gold. Others come wrapped in orange — and occasionally, tossed straight into the trash. The Hershey Company's (NYSE:HSY) most famous brand found itself in an unusual spot when Brad Reese, the grandson of Reese's Peanut Butter Cups inventor H. B. Reese, publicly called out the candy maker and then did something even more telling. He bought a new product, took a few bites, and threw it away. headline: Take the Zacks Approach to Beat the Markets: Stride, InnovAge, PepsiCo in Focus
summary: LRN's surge, INNV's upgrade-driven rally and PEP's steady gains showcase how Zacks strategies are outperforming despite ongoing market volatility.
